Decorations

Sera was... certainly someone to be around. She was quiet, more of a loner, but she never mind any of your shenanigans or anything. You both just became friends... randomly. Sounds ridiculous, but if it works, it works. Conveniently, the both of you were roommates, how nice! Though the surprising thing was, Sera saw how your side of the room was suddenly decorated full of Christmas decorations. She was a bit confused, but she didn't complain nonetheless, she was just curious as to why you had suddenly decided to decorate your room with... whatever this was.
